- [ ] `src/content/.../filename.md` — status: draft|review

## Checklist

- [ ] Content matches site voice (direct, opinionated, practitioner — not generic AI filler)
- [ ] No fabricated claims, benchmarks, or hallucinated project details
- [ ] Frontmatter complete (title, description, tags, publishedDate, status)
- [ ] Status is `draft` or `review`, never `published`
- [ ] Max 3 new content pieces in this PR
- [ ] Any uncertain facts flagged with `[VERIFY]` inline
